name: Dirt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the Oreos until they resemble potting soil.
2. Set aside.
3. Cream together the butter or margarine, cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until smooth and fluffy.
4. Combine the pudding mix with milk until well blended.
5. Fold in the whipped topping.
6. Gently fold the cream mixture into the pudding mixture.
7. Layer the cake starting with one-third of the cookie crumbs, followed by half of the pudding mixture, then a third of the crumbs, the remaining half of the pudding mixture, and finally the top layer of crumbs.
8. Refrigerate for 10-12 hours before serving.
9. Remove from refrigerator and decorate with flowers.
10. Serve by digging out portions with a garden trowel. Serves 10 to 12.
